name: Apeksha Saraf
description: Apeksha Saraf is an accomplished Full Stack BI Developer with 10 years of experience in designing and implementing end-to-end business intelligence solutions. At Orange Data Tech, she leverages her deep expertise in data analytics, visualization, and software development to transform complex data into actionable insights. Apeksha’s proficiency in both front-end and back-end development, combined with her innovative approach, enables her to deliver robust, scalable, and user-centric BI solutions. Her commitment to excellence and passion for empowering businesses with data-driven strategies make her an invaluable asset in driving digital transformation and informed decision-making.

name: Chetan Dubey
description: Chetan Dubey is a dynamic Marketing Associate with a passion for creating impactful strategies that drive brand growth and engagement. At Orange Data Tech, he leverages his creativity and analytical skills to develop innovative marketing campaigns that resonate with target audiences. Chetan’s expertise in market research, content creation, and campaign management enables him to deliver measurable results and support business objectives. His dedication to staying ahead of industry trends and commitment to excellence reflect his drive to enhance brand visibility and contribute to the company's success.

name: Chhaya Sharma
description: Chhaya Sharma is a dedicated Data Quality Engineer with 5 years of experience in ensuring the accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data systems. At Orange Data Tech, she plays a critical role in maintaining high data standards by implementing robust testing frameworks and quality assurance processes. Chhaya’s keen attention to detail, combined with her expertise in data validation and analysis, ensures that businesses can trust their data for informed decision-making. Her proactive approach to identifying and resolving data discrepancies reflects her commitment to excellence and her passion for delivering high-quality, reliable data solutions that drive business success.

name: Deepali Tiwari
description: Deepali Tiwari is a skilled Full Stack BI Developer with 3 years of experience in designing and enhancing business intelligence solutions. At Orange Data Tech, she leverages her expertise in both front-end and back-end technologies to develop intuitive, data-driven applications that help businesses make informed decisions. With a strong foundation in BI tools, data modeling, and analytics, Deepali is committed to delivering high-performance solutions that drive operational efficiency and strategic growth.

name: Lovleet jain
description: Lovleet Jain, a tech evangelist with nearly three decades of experience, began his career as an entrepreneur and has played a key role in the growth of a publicly listed company. As the founder of Orange Data Tech, he specializes in data engineering, analytics, and machine learning. Renowned for building highly efficient, collaborative teams across time zones, Lovleet has a proven ability to optimize processes and deliver innovative, cost-effective solutions. His expertise lies in transforming complex challenges into streamlined systems, driving success in business intelligence and reporting across industries.

name: Saloni Saxena
description: A skilled full-stack developer with expertise in ETL pipelines, data cleaning, and BI development. Brings extensive experience in managing the complete data lifecycle—extracting, transforming, and loading data from various sources with accuracy and efficiency. Passionate about creating insightful BI reports and dashboards that empower businesses to make data-driven decisions. Adept at handling complex datasets and delivering tailored solutions that align with organizational goals, ensuring impactful results.

name: Shreya Jain
description: Shreya Jain is a Business Analyst with three years of progressive experience, focused on aligning technical solutions with core business strategy. Having successfully transitioned into this domain, she utilizes a foundational understanding of process and flow to streamline execution. Known for her analytical rigor and commitment to data-informed solutions, Shreya embraces challenging situations and delivers clear and results-driven project outcomes.

name: Sourabh Kosti
description: Sourabh is a dedicated and detail-oriented professional with a strong background in "software development".  He thrive on solving complex problems and driving innovation within his domain. Passionate about continuous learning and professional growth, he enjoys exploring new technologies, tools, and methodologies to enhance productivity and deliver value to organization.
